chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1638 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 11-09-2025 Mr. Abdul Raheem Mahar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G-Sindh a/w Muhammad Hassan, TEO, Primary (Male), Mirwah (respondent No.8). **** Learned AAG files comments on behalf of respondent No.7, taken on record and copy whereof is provided to counsel for the petitioner, who after going through the same, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
